collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (2 total Queries, 2 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(tanggal_selesai, '%d') as tanggal, SUM(total_harga) as pendapatan FROM `riwayat_transaksi` WHERE `tanggal_selesai` >= '2025-07-01 00:00:00' AND `tanggal_selesai` <= '2025-07-31 23:59:59' GROUP BY DATE(tanggal_selesai) ORDER BY `tanggal_selesai` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
